features: Bacofoil All Purpose Zipper bags, perfect for at home and on the go
Includes secure zip tight seal preventing any leaks, perfect for storing, fresh keeping, freezing, transporting and organising
Flexible stand alone base making it easier to fill
Contents: 12 x Medium Bacofoil All Purpose Zipper Bags, Approx size of bag: 27cm x 24cm
description: Product Description Perfect all rounder for at home and on the go - storing, fresh keeping, freezing, transporting and organisingSecure zip tight seal with a zzzziip you can hear- opens and closes easily again and again. Protection for at home and on the go, Resealable, With secure zip closure, Flexible stand alone base for easy filling, Tear-resistant bag, Suitable for use in the freezer. Strength you can trust. Directions Registered trademark of a company of the Melitta Group Safety Warning 1 Open the bag so the base folds out 2 Pour contents carefully into the Stand alone bags 3 Pull the Zipper along the guide rail and hear me zzzip close! Manufacturer Contact Information Hortonwood 45 Telford Tf1 7Fa See more
